calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
Zack Zakaryan, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Carol M. Rohan.
Default was entered against defendant on March 2, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 2, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Carol M. Rohan as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,689.49.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,638.06.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $428.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $27,755.55.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 9/13/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Continued To Jun-14-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-12-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
